messages.content:
中译英：姓名：刘剑峰
性别：男
职位头衔：浙江财经大学金融学院教授
单位名称：浙江财经大学
通讯地址：杭州下沙高教园区学源街18号浙江财经大学金融学院楼417
邮编：310018 
联系电话（必填）：<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>
联系邮箱 <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>

Name: Liu Jianfeng
Gender: Male
Job Title: Professor, School of Finance, Zhejiang University of Finance & Economics
Organization: Zhejiang University of Finance & Economics
Mailing Address: Room 417, School of Finance, Zhejiang University of Finance & Economics, 18 Xueyuan Street, Xiasha Higher Education Park, Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China
Postal Code: 310018
Contact Number (required): <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>
Email: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>
中译英: 我在2022年上半年成为她的导师并在2022年暑假指导她完成专业实践项目，项目具体内容是实习报告撰写。2022年我还担任她下半年专业课《金融伦理与职业道德》授课老师。

I became her supervisor in the first half of 2022 and guided her in completing a professional internship project, specifically focusing on writing an internship report. During the summer vacation of 2022, I also served as her instructor for the course "Financial Ethics and Professional Ethics" in the second half of the year.

润色如下内容：I am writing with great pleasure to recommend Miss Yunzhi LIU, one of my students for acceptance into your esteemed postgraduate program. I became her supervisor in the first half of 2022 and guided her in completing a professional internship project, specifically focusing on writing an internship report. During the summer vacation of 2022, I also served as her instructor for the course “Financial Ethics and Professional Ethics” in the second half of the year. As her supervisor as well as her teacher, I gained frequent contact with LIU, who in my eyes is always a diligent, bright, and excellent student.

I am delighted to write this recommendation letter for Miss Yunzhi LIU, one of my students, who I highly recommend for acceptance into your esteemed postgraduate program. Miss Liu has been under my supervision since the first half of 2022, and I had the opportunity to guide her in completing a professional internship project, with a specific focus on writing an internship report. Additionally, during the summer vacation of 2022, I had the privilege of being her instructor for the course "Financial Ethics and Professional Ethics" in the later half of the year. 

Throughout my interaction with Miss Liu, both as her supervisor and teacher, I have consistently observed her to be a diligent, bright, and outstanding student.
中译英：她具有一定的学术研究能力以及钻研精神。首先，她所实习的单位竞争力强，她在实习期间表现较好，并取得一定成果。特别是她非常好地完成了暑期专业实践项目，聚焦大宗商品交易商的衍生品使用情况进行研究。她所撰写的研究报告《大宗商品交易商运用衍生品情况研究 ——以邦吉集团（Bunge）为例》质量较高，在学校专业实践项目中表现优异。

She has demonstrated a certain level of academic research ability and a spirit of exploration. Firstly, the company where she completed her internship is highly competitive, and she performed exceptionally well during her internship, achieving significant results. In particular, she successfully completed a summer professional practice project that focused on studying the use of derivatives by commodity traders. Her research report, titled "A Study on the Use of Derivatives by Commodity Traders - A Case Study of Bunge Group," was of high quality and received excellent recognition within the school's professional practice program.

润色如下内容：She has demonstrated a certain level of academic research ability and a spirit of exploration. Firstly, the company where she completed her internship is highly competitive, and she performed exceptionally well during her internship, achieving significant results. In particular, she successfully completed a summer professional practice project that focused on studying the use of derivatives by commodity traders. Her research report, titled “A Study on the Use of Derivatives by Commodity Traders - A Case Study of Bunge Group,” was of high quality and received excellent recognition within the school’s professional practice program.

Miss Liu has displayed notable academic research ability and a strong enthusiasm for exploration. Firstly, the company she interned at was highly competitive, and she delivered exceptional performance, yielding significant outcomes. Specifically, she successfully executed a summer professional practice project that concentrated on examining the utilization of derivatives by commodity traders. Her research report, titled "A Study on the Use of Derivatives by Commodity Traders - A Case Study of Bunge Group," exhibited exemplary quality and garnered extensive recognition within the school's professional practice program.
润色如下内容： It is also worthwhile her exceptional classroom performance
It is also worth mentioning her exceptional performance in the classroom.
中译英： 她学习态度认真。上课全勤，认真听讲，课堂作业质量高，在课堂作业中体现出自己的见解。不仅如此，她还不满足课堂上的知识，利用课余时间拓展专业知识，并考取了专业相关证书，包括FRM一级、期货从业资格证等。她的好学勤奋也让她在我的这么专业课上取得了90分的优异成绩。

She is a dedicated learner. She is punctual and attentive in class, demonstrating a high quality of work in her class assignments and showcasing her own insights. Not only that, but she also goes beyond the classroom knowledge, utilizing her spare time to expand her professional knowledge and obtain relevant certifications, such as Level 1 of the Financial Risk Manager (FRM) and the Futures Practitioner Qualification Certificate. Her eagerness to learn and diligence resulted in her outstanding achievement of 90 marks in my professional course as well.

润色如下内容：She is a dedicated learner. She is punctual and attentive in class, demonstrating a high quality of work in her class assignments and showcasing her own insights. Not only that, but she also goes beyond the classroom knowledge, utilizing her spare time to expand her professional knowledge and obtain relevant certifications, such as Level 1 of the Financial Risk Manager (FRM) and the Futures Practitioner Qualification Certificate. Her eagerness to learn and diligence resulted in her outstanding achievement of 90 marks in my professional course as well.

She is a motivated learner who approaches her studies with great dedication. She consistently attends classes, actively listens, and produces high-quality assignments that reflect her own insights. Moreover, she goes above and beyond the classroom curriculum, utilizing her free time to expand her professional knowledge and acquire relevant certifications, including Level 1 of the Financial Risk Manager (FRM) and the Futures Practitioner Qualification Certificate. Her thirst for knowledge and diligent work ethic have also translated into outstanding academic performance, as evidenced by her exceptional achievement of 90 marks in my professional course.

润色如下内容：In brief, I am sure that Yunzhi LIU, with her excellent education background, exceptional diligence, persevering spirit, and sense of social responsibility, will make success in future study and research at your esteemed university. Therefore, I recommend her to your university with absolute confidence.

In summary, I am confident that Yunzhi LIU, with her outstanding educational background, exceptional diligence, persevering spirit, and sense of social responsibility, will excel in her future studies and research at your esteemed university. Therefore, I highly recommend her for admission to your university without reservation.
